text:
Hello, today I offer you a sophrology session to help you relax and unwind. For this, very gently, I will invite you, like me, to come and sit comfortably on a chair or on a sofa. Then you can place your feet flat on the floor. Slowly, I invite you to rest your hands gently on your thighs. Then you can very gently look all around you, your environment, the objects around you. Then, when you feel safe, I gently invite you to close your eyes.

Now that you feel safe, I suggest you press a little through your feet to become aware of your right foot. For that, you will gently press on your toes, roll your foot, press on your heels. Then put your feet flat on the floor again. Now, I invite you to press on the outer edges of your feet, roll your feet, then press on the inner edges of your feet. Then rest your feet, placing them on the floor. And you will become aware of the weight of your feet on the floor. You can maybe imagine as if you had the
